underlying_goal: Upgrade a legacy PHP 7.0 application to run on modern PHP versions (7.4 → 8.2), fix all compatibility errors, update frontend dependencies, replace outdated packages, and reach PHPStan level 5
friction_detail: Assistant over-engineered routing fix before user stopped it; multiple PHP 8.x deprecation errors surfaced iteratively requiring repeated fixes; Valitron was referenced but not installed causing confusion
brief_summary: User wanted to upgrade a PHP 7.0 legacy app to PHP 8.2; assistant systematically resolved Illuminate database errors, Flight routing issues, Symfony deprecations, replaced aura/auth with native bcrypt auth, updated Bootstrap/jQuery CDN versions, and configured PHPStan for progressive level improvements — app ended functional with clean homepage loading.
user_instructions_to_assistant: Investiga primero, informa y espera confirmación antes de ejecutar
Haz solo review, no cambies nada (en la revisión de aura/auth)
Ve a lo seguro, revisa bien todos los sitios donde se usa auth antes de reemplazar
